title: Pure vegetarian flavors, fresh and masterfully prepared.
subtitle: From South Indian breakfast classics to North Indian curries, kofta specials, tandoori breads, and refreshing beverages — over 100 items to choose from.

items.name: Tea / Coffee
items.description: Freshly brewed masala tea or filter coffee served hot — the perfect start to your day.

items.name: Badam Milk
items.description: Rich and creamy almond milk flavored with saffron and cardamom.

items.name: Masala Tea
items.description: Traditional Indian spiced tea brewed with ginger, cardamom, and fresh milk.

items.name: Ginger Tea
items.description: Warming ginger tea with a spicy kick — refreshing and soothing.

items.name: Idly (2 pcs)
items.description: Soft steamed rice cakes served with sambar and coconut chutney.

items.name: Rava Idly
items.description: Semolina-based idli with cashews and tempered mustard — fluffy and unique.

items.name: Vada
items.description: Crispy urad dal fritters served with sambar and coconut chutney.

items.name: Rice Bath
items.description: Flavorful spiced rice with vegetables, peanuts, and tempered seasonings.

items.name: ChowChow Bath
items.description: A duo of spicy khara bath and sweet kesari bath — classic Karnataka combo.

items.name: Vada Curry Dosa
items.description: Unique dosa filled with crispy vada and curry — a rare find you won't get elsewhere.

items.name: Paneer Keema Dosa
items.description: Crispy dosa stuffed with spiced paneer keema — a house specialty.

items.name: Soya Keema Dosa
items.description: Dosa filled with textured soya keema — protein-rich and flavorful.

items.name: Mudgal Dosa
items.description: Crispy regional dosa with a flavorful twist — a must-try specialty.

items.name: Masala Dosa
items.description: Golden crispy dosa filled with spiced potato masala, served with sambar and chutney.

items.name: Tatte Idli
items.description: Super soft, giant plate idli — soul-satisfying and paired with amazing chutneys and sambar.

items.name: Mini Thali
items.description: A complete mini meal with mudgal dosa, idli vada, pongal, sweet, and sambar — the best value combo.

items.name: North Indian Meals
items.description: Complete North Indian thali with roti, dal, sabzi, rice, salad, and sweet.

items.name: Channa Masala
items.description: Chickpeas cooked in a spiced tomato-onion gravy — hearty and satisfying.

items.name: Gobi Masala
items.description: Cauliflower florets in a tangy spiced masala gravy.

items.name: Green Peas Masala
items.description: Fresh green peas in a creamy, mildly spiced gravy.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
items.description: Grilled paneer cubes in a rich, smoky tikka masala gravy.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Soft paneer cubes in a velvety butter-tomato cream sauce.

items.name: Veg Kofta
items.description: Deep-fried vegetable dumplings in a rich, spiced tomato gravy.

items.name: Veg Malai Kofta
items.description: Creamy kofta dumplings in a cashew-cream based white gravy — rich and indulgent.

items.name: Paneer Kofta
items.description: Paneer-stuffed kofta balls in a creamy, aromatic gravy.
